headline: Fortinet’s Google Cloud Award Spotlights Workload Security And Valuation Gap
summary: Fortinet (NasdaqGS:FTNT) has been named the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year for Workload Security. The award recognizes Fortinet's FortiCNAPP platform and its role in securing workloads across Google Cloud environments. The recognition highlights Fortinet's position in cloud security for hybrid and multi cloud customers. For investors tracking cloud and cybersecurity, this award links Fortinet directly to one of the major hyperscalers through a clear product use case: workload...
